account.free_plan_msg: You are on the Free plan
account.push_not_supported: Push notifications are not supported by your browser.

plans.vip_desc_1: Watch all archive videos, as well as new releases from Haitian and international influencers as soon as they go online.
plans.vip_desc_2: As a VIP subscriber, you will also have access to influencer videos that we haven't officially published yet.
plans.vip_desc_3: Download as many videos and photos as you want, without any limits or restrictions.
plans.vip_desc_4: Access all content in Full HD 4K for superior image quality and an exceptional visual experience.
plans.priority_access: You will also benefit from priority access to new content regularly added.
plans.how_to_pay: How to pay for your VIP subscription?
plans.pay_method_desc: Payment is simple, fast, and secure via MonCash or NatCash.
plans.step_1: Step 1: Download the TapTap Send app from the App Store or Google Play Store.
plans.step_2: Step 2: Click on "Sign Up" or the Google logo.
plans.step_3: Step 3: Enter your first and last name.
plans.step_4: Step 4: Enter your phone number and the confirmation code received by SMS.
plans.step_7: Step 7: Add the name of the payment recipient according to your choice:
plans.step_7_moncash: • If you choose MonCash, use the MonCash number indicated on the site and the associated name.
plans.step_7_natcash: • If you choose NatCash, use the NatCash number indicated on the site and the provided name.
plans.step_9: Step 9: Enter the requested contact information and click "Save".
plans.step_10: Step 10: Check all information and click "Send".
plans.file_limits: PNG, JPG, JPEG up to 5 MB

watch.invalid_url: The URL of this video is invalid.
watch.login_to_discuss: Log in to join the discussion.

live.no_live_desc: Come back later or wait for the administrator's signal.

search.no_results_desc: Try other keywords or browse our categories.

legal.condition_1: be at least 18 years old (or the age of majority in your country);
legal.condition_2: view these contents of your own free will, privately;
legal.condition_3: reside in a country where this type of content is authorized by law.
